title: Connecticut DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (Blocked — CT DAS fetch pending)
description: Narrative research notes for Connecticut DDS pay: administering agency (CT DSS Disability Determination Services Unit), examiner/supervisor classifications on the CT Salary Group (SG) system with 9-step progression, estimated salary groups (examiner SG-21–23, supervisor SG-24–26), AFSCME Local 714 / SEBAC P-2 2017-2027 CBA context, key CT DAS / Comptroller resource URLs, and gaps. Exact class codes and SG-grid dollar values were not confirmed. Companion to CT/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: Connecticut Department of Administrative Services (DAS) / AFSCME Council 4; CT Dept of Social Services (DSS) Disability Determination Services Unit
source.title: CT DDS salary research notes (CT DAS Salary Plans pending; SG estimates)

update_cadence: annual (CT DAS salary plans, July 1 effective)
notes: Browser-fetch pending: agency, the SG classification system, and the AFSCME Local 714 / SEBAC P-2 2017-2027 CBA are confirmed, but exact class codes are unverified and the SG assignments (SG-21–23 examiner, SG-24–26 supervisor) are estimates — the CT DAS Salary Plans PDF requires direct download verification and was not retrieved. SEBAC 2017-2027 term → temporal_coverage. Manual fetch: portal.ct.gov/das salary plans, council4.org, or data.ct.gov payroll.
